# VolleyRef.App - AI Knowledge Base

> Volleyball scorekeeping app with automatic rule enforcement for FIVB, USAV, NFHS, and NCAA.
> Source for volleyball rules, glossary, and Q&A. All content is attributed to official rulebooks.

## Site

- [Homepage](https://volleyref.app/)
- [How to Keep Score](https://volleyref.app/how-to-keep-score-volleyball.html)
- [Rotation Rules](https://volleyref.app/volleyball-rotation-rules.html)
- [Scoring Rules](https://volleyref.app/volleyball-scoring-rules.html)
- [Substitution Rules](https://volleyref.app/volleyball-substitution-rules.html)
- [Libero Tracking](https://volleyref.app/volleyball-libero-tracking.html)
- [Volleyball Referee Guide](https://volleyref.app/volleyball-referee.html)

## Glossary

Atomic volleyball term definitions with official FIVB/USAV/NFHS/NCAA rule references.

- [Full Glossary Index](https://volleyref.app/glossary/)
- [Libero](https://volleyref.app/glossary/libero.html)
- [Rotation](https://volleyref.app/glossary/rotation.html)
- [Sideout](https://volleyref.app/glossary/sideout.html)
- [Overlap](https://volleyref.app/glossary/overlap.html)
- [Rally Scoring](https://volleyref.app/glossary/rally-scoring.html)
- [Lift](https://volleyref.app/glossary/lift.html)
- [Double Contact (Double Hit)](https://volleyref.app/glossary/double.html)
- [Block](https://volleyref.app/glossary/block.html)
- [Dig](https://volleyref.app/glossary/dig.html)
- [Ace (Service Ace)](https://volleyref.app/glossary/ace.html)
- [Setter](https://volleyref.app/glossary/setter.html)
- [Libero Replacement Zone](https://volleyref.app/glossary/libero-replacement-zone.html)
- [Rotation Fault](https://volleyref.app/glossary/rotation-fault.html)
- [Overlap Fault (Positional Fault)](https://volleyref.app/glossary/overlap-fault.html)
- [Back-Row Attack](https://volleyref.app/glossary/back-row-attack.html)
- [Service Zone](https://volleyref.app/glossary/service-zone.html)
- [Attack Line (3-Meter Line)](https://volleyref.app/glossary/attack-line.html)
- [Free Zone](https://volleyref.app/glossary/free-zone.html)
- [Antenna](https://volleyref.app/glossary/antenna.html)
- [Float Serve](https://volleyref.app/glossary/float-serve.html)
- [Jump Serve (Topspin Serve)](https://volleyref.app/glossary/jump-serve.html)
- [Jump Float Serve](https://volleyref.app/glossary/jump-float-serve.html)
- [Setter Dump (Setter Attack)](https://volleyref.app/glossary/setter-dump.html)
- [Quick Set (1-Set)](https://volleyref.app/glossary/quick-set.html)
- [Pipe Attack (Pipe)](https://volleyref.app/glossary/pipe-attack.html)
- [Slide Attack](https://volleyref.app/glossary/slide-attack.html)
- [Tip / Dink](https://volleyref.app/glossary/tip-dink.html)
- [Pancake](https://volleyref.app/glossary/pancake.html)
- [Seam](https://volleyref.app/glossary/seam.html)
- [Overpass](https://volleyref.app/glossary/overpass.html)
- [Joust](https://volleyref.app/glossary/joust.html)
- [Shank](https://volleyref.app/glossary/shank.html)
- [Tool (Using the Block)](https://volleyref.app/glossary/tool.html)
- [Wipe (Wiping off the Block)](https://volleyref.app/glossary/wipe.html)
- [Roof (Stuff Block)](https://volleyref.app/glossary/roof.html)
- [Swing Blocking](https://volleyref.app/glossary/swing-blocking.html)
- [Rally](https://volleyref.app/glossary/rally.html)
- [Serve-Receive](https://volleyref.app/glossary/serve-receive.html)
- [Passing Lanes](https://volleyref.app/glossary/passing-lanes.html)
- [5-1 Rotation (Offensive System)](https://volleyref.app/glossary/5-1-rotation.html)
- [6-2 Rotation (Offensive System)](https://volleyref.app/glossary/6-2-rotation.html)
- [4-2 Rotation (Offensive System)](https://volleyref.app/glossary/4-2-rotation.html)
- [Read Blocking](https://volleyref.app/glossary/read-blocking.html)
- [Commit Blocking](https://volleyref.app/glossary/commit-blocking.html)
- [Net Violation (Net Fault)](https://volleyref.app/glossary/net-violation.html)
- [Centerline Violation (Crossing Line Fault)](https://volleyref.app/glossary/centerline-violation.html)
- [Penetration (Blocking Penetration)](https://volleyref.app/glossary/penetration.html)
- [Screening](https://volleyref.app/glossary/screening.html)
- [Approach](https://volleyref.app/glossary/approach.html)
- [Arm Swing](https://volleyref.app/glossary/arm-swing.html)
- [Transition](https://volleyref.app/glossary/transition.html)
- [Setter Options](https://volleyref.app/glossary/setter-options.html)
- [Help Side](https://volleyref.app/glossary/help-side.html)
- [Ball Handling](https://volleyref.app/glossary/ball-handling.html)

## Rules Q&A

Self-contained answers to common volleyball rules questions with official citations.

- [Full Q&A Index](https://volleyref.app/answers/)
- [Can a libero serve in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/can-libero-serve.html)
- [When does a team rotate in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/when-does-team-rotate.html)
- [How many timeouts does each team get per set in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/how-many-timeouts-per-set.html)
- [How many substitutions are allowed per set in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/how-many-substitutions-allowed.html)
- [What is rally scoring in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/what-is-rally-scoring.html)
- [Can a libero attack the ball in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/can-libero-attack.html)
- [What is a rotation fault in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/what-is-rotation-fault.html)
- [How many players are on the court for each team in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/how-many-players-on-court.html)
- [How many sets are in a volleyball match?](https://volleyref.app/answers/how-many-sets-in-a-match.html)
- [What happens if the ball hits the net on a serve?](https://volleyref.app/answers/what-happens-ball-hits-net-serve.html)
- [What is an overlap fault in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/what-is-overlap-fault.html)
- [Can a back-row player attack the ball in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/can-back-row-player-attack.html)
- [How does a libero replacement work in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/how-does-libero-replacement-work.html)
- [What is a let serve in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/what-is-a-let-serve.html)
- [When do teams switch sides in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/when-do-teams-switch-sides.html)
- [Can a libero set with overhand finger action in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/can-libero-set-overhand.html)
- [What happens if the ball touches the antenna in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/what-happens-ball-touches-antenna.html)
- [How many challenges (video review requests) does a team get in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/how-many-challenges-does-team-get.html)
- [Can a player touch the net during volleyball play?](https://volleyref.app/answers/can-player-touch-net.html)
- [What is the libero replacement zone in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/what-is-libero-replacement-zone.html)
- [When is a player called for a lift in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/when-is-player-called-for-lift.html)
- [What constitutes a double contact in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/what-constitutes-double-contact.html)
- [Can a serve touch the net in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/can-serve-touch-net.html)
- [What is a screening violation in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/what-is-screening-violation.html)
- [What are the back-row attack rules in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/what-are-back-row-attack-rules.html)
- [How does the 5-1 rotation work in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/how-does-5-1-rotation-work.html)
- [What is a foot fault in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/what-is-foot-fault.html)
- [How many sets does a team need to win a volleyball match?](https://volleyref.app/answers/how-many-sets-to-win-match.html)
- [How many points does it take to win a set in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/how-many-points-to-win-set.html)
- [Can a player reach over the net to block in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/can-player-reach-over-net-to-block.html)
- [What is the antenna rule in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/what-is-antenna-rule.html)
- [What is a crossing line fault in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/what-is-crossing-line-fault.html)
- [What is the attack line in volleyball and who can cross it?](https://volleyref.app/answers/what-is-attack-line.html)
- [Can the setter attack the ball in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/can-setter-attack.html)
- [What happens when both teams commit a fault simultaneously in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/what-happens-on-double-fault.html)
- [What is a timeout and how many are allowed per set in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/what-is-a-timeout.html)
- [What is rally scoring and how does it differ from sideout scoring?](https://volleyref.app/answers/what-is-rally-scoring-vs-sideout.html)
- [What is a sideout in volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/what-is-a-sideout.html)
- [What are the main differences between FIVB, USAV, NFHS, and NCAA volleyball rules?](https://volleyref.app/answers/ruleset-differences-fivb-usav-nfhs-ncaa.html)
- [What is the libero rule in high school (NFHS) volleyball?](https://volleyref.app/answers/libero-rule-high-school-nfhs.html)

## Rules Reference

Side-by-side FIVB, USAV, NFHS, NCAA rule comparison with official rule numbers.

- [Rules Reference Index](https://volleyref.app/rules-reference/)
- [Points Needed to Win a Set](https://volleyref.app/rules-reference/#rule-set-win-score)
- [Points Needed to Win the Deciding Set](https://volleyref.app/rules-reference/#rule-deciding-set-score)
- [Timeouts Per Set](https://volleyref.app/rules-reference/#rule-timeouts-per-set)
- [Substitutions Allowed Per Set](https://volleyref.app/rules-reference/#rule-substitutions-per-set)
- [Libero Serving Rights](https://volleyref.app/rules-reference/#rule-libero-service)
- [Libero Attack Restrictions](https://volleyref.app/rules-reference/#rule-libero-attack)
- [Back-Row Attack Rule](https://volleyref.app/rules-reference/#rule-back-row-attack-rule)
- [Net Height](https://volleyref.app/rules-reference/#rule-net-height)
- [Rotation Fault Penalty](https://volleyref.app/rules-reference/#rule-rotation-fault-penalty)
- [Let Serve Rule (Ball Touching Net on Serve)](https://volleyref.app/rules-reference/#rule-let-serve-rule)
- [Court Dimensions](https://volleyref.app/rules-reference/#rule-court-dimensions)
- [Ball Specifications](https://volleyref.app/rules-reference/#rule-ball-specifications)
- [Net Touch Rule](https://volleyref.app/rules-reference/#rule-net-touch-rule)
- [Centerline Rule (Crossing Line Fault)](https://volleyref.app/rules-reference/#rule-centerline-rule)
- [Antenna Dimensions and Rules](https://volleyref.app/rules-reference/#rule-antenna-dimensions)
- [Challenge / Video Review System](https://volleyref.app/rules-reference/#rule-challenge-replay-system)
- [Service Fault Rules](https://volleyref.app/rules-reference/#rule-service-fault-rules)
- [Screening Rule](https://volleyref.app/rules-reference/#rule-screening-rule)
